final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] num1,
    input [7:0] num2,
    input [1:0] opcode,
    input obf_enable,
    output reg [7:0] result
);always @(*) begin
    if(obf_enable) begin
        case(opcode)
            2'b00: result = num1 + num2;
            2'b01: result = num1 - num2;
            2'b10: result = num1 * num2;
            2'b11: result = num1 / num2;
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
